channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: WATCH: Jalen Brunson and his father share an unbreakable bond through basketball
item.description: As a toddler, Jalen watched his father Rick play at Madison Square Garden; now he shines on basketball's biggest stage, and the fa...

item.title: Iran live updates: Helicopter pilots rescued by unmanned boat, official says
item.description: President Donald Trump announced major combat operations against Iran on Feb. 28, with large joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.

item.title: WATCH: Are smartphones to blame for declining birth rates?
item.description: Researchers suggest smartphones may be a key factor in why people are having fewer children.

item.title: Platner seeks Maine Senate nomination and other primaries to watch today
item.description: Maine Democrat Graham Platner aims to secure the nomination to challenge Republican Sen. Susan Collins in November.
